raw.advertiser_name: 遊戯王 マスターデュエル
raw.message: 強力な追加カードが登場

hook.summary: Showcase of new card selection pack and game logo.
hook.visual_action: A grid of six Yu-Gi-Oh cards is displayed, followed by a transition to the game logo over a digital game board.
hook.text_overlay: KONAMI, セレクションパック 「ラス・オブ・ザ・タイラント」登場！, Yu-Gi-Oh! MASTER DUEL

scene_flow: Display of six featured cards from the 'Wrath of the Tyrant' selection pack.
Transition to the Yu-Gi-Oh! Master Duel logo over a game board background.
Final call-to-action screen with the game logo and 'Play Now' button.
on_screen_text: セレクションパック 「ラス・オブ・ザ・タイラント」登場！
audience_proxy: Competitive card game enthusiasts and fans of the Yu-Gi-Oh! franchise.
